name: Popfeed
description: Sync Jellyfin watched and unwatched actions to Popfeed over ATProto. Supports per-user Popfeed account mappings, searchable exclusions, recent activity visibility, and dashboard-triggered dry-run testing.
overview: Sync Jellyfin watched state to Popfeed over ATProto

versions.changelog:
- Trigger sync on PlaybackFinished (watching a film/episode to completion) in addition to manual TogglePlayed toggles
- Fix Popfeed review URL in Bluesky posts (was posting a raw AT-URI, now posts the correct /profile/{handle}/review/{rkey} link)
- Fix activity text language: Popfeed review text now respects the configured Bluesky post language per user
- Fix watched timestamp timezone ambiguity: LastPlayedDate is now correctly treated as UTC
- Add native Popfeed watched-list (social.popfeed.feed.listItem) records alongside review records
- Upload and attach poster images to Popfeed review records
- Stale plugin directories are cleaned up automatically on startup/reinstall

- Added per-user Popfeed mappings
- Added searchable exclusion UI and dry-run test endpoint
- Added recent sync activity panel in the plugin settings page
- Added GitHub-release manifest generation for direct Jellyfin repository install
